=Index of module types=

|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\A|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="ARG"| module type Notif.ARG >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Notif >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~A~R~G>> is for making <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Make>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="ARG_SIMPLE"| module type Notif.ARG_SIMPLE >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Notif >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~A~R~G~_~S~I~M~P~L~E>> is for making <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Make~_~Simple>>~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\C|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Cache_sig"| module type Request_cache.Cache_sig >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Request_cache >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\I|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="ICSIG"| module type Icons.ICSIG >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Icons >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\P|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="PAGE"| module type Page.PAGE >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The signature of the module to be given as parameter to the functor~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\S|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="S"| module type Notif.S >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Notif >>~]||
\\
